creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://reviews.freebsd.org/project/members/21/> is visually easier to grasp than (for example) <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/main/share/misc/committers-doc.dot>, however the list of members appears to be outdated. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/news/newsflash/#2021-08-18:1> 

> … Enhanced commit privileges: Ed Maste (doc, src)

– Ed Maste is not listed; and so on.
